message:
fix(tools): harden image loading against decompression bombs and OOM

Two safety improvements to the built-in tools:

- resize_image_if_needed: replaces image::load_from_memory with
  ImageReader that applies explicit Limits (128MB max allocation),
  preventing decompression bomb attacks where a small compressed image
  expands to gigabytes of memory
- ReadTool: adds a safety break that stops accumulating line content
  once the buffer exceeds 2x DEFAULT_MAX_BYTES, preventing OOM on
  pathologically huge files or limit values

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
